title: Open pictogram/icon set for stations + triage (license-clean)
context: Community repair events benefit from clear visual wayfinding at stations (textile repair, bike repair, electrical triage, etc.) and triage signage. An openly-licensed pictogram/icon set — designed from scratch or sourced from permissively licensed icon libraries — removes the barrier of commissioning custom artwork. All icons must be license-clean: no third-party logos, trademarks, or copyrighted artwork; no 'Repair Café' branding. The preferred license for output is CC-BY-4.0 or a compatible open license. The icon set must be print-legible (sufficient contrast and clarity at small printed sizes).
objective: Design or source a license-clean, openly-licensed pictogram/icon set for repair event stations and triage categories, verified free of third-party trademarks or copyrighted artwork, and usable in print at small sizes.
acceptanceCriteria: An icon set covering at least: textile repair station, bike repair station, furniture/wood station, general triage, electrical triage (referral-only), and a 'stop / refer to expert' symbol

All icons are license-clean: either original works created for this project (MIT or CC-BY-4.0) or sourced from a permissively licensed library (CC0, CC-BY, MIT); source and license recorded for each icon
No third-party logos, trademarks, or the 'Repair Café' name/logo appear in any icon
Icons are print-legible: sufficient contrast and clarity when printed at A5 or smaller; a print-smoke test or visual review confirms legibility
The icon set is committed to the repo with a license file and a provenance record of any sourced icons; output is published under CC-BY-4.0 or MIT as appropriate
output: A committed, license-clean pictogram/icon set for repair event stations and triage categories, with provenance records for any sourced icons and a print-legibility confirmation.
